title: tragopogon otschiaurii
intro: Tragopogon otschiaurii, also known as Otschiaurii salsify, is a plant species within the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is a perennial with yellow flowers and edible roots, which have been used in traditional medicine for their various medicinal properties. The roots of Tragopogon otschiaurii are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating conditions such as wounds and skin irritations. Tragopogon otschiaurii can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and has been reported to have health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved digestion.
